content: Uranus has 27 known moons, with the five largest being Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. These moons are named after characters from the works of William Shakespeare and Alexander Pope.
raw_content: Uranus has 27 known moons, with the five largest being Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. These moons are named after characters from the works of William Shakespeare and Alexander Pope.
